title: Fallen Paladin's Mace
description: This resource pack adds Fallen Paladin's Hammer from the Calamity mod for Terraria.
body:
This resource pack **adds Fallen Paladin's Hammer** from the Calamity mod for Terraria. It also _changes the texture of the heavy core_.
![Mace and Heavy Core](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/9fd1e1bf928450eb3b78945e16da43b6771070b5.jpeg)
